title: CityFlux Event Streaming
description: A real-time event pipeline built with Kafka and Spark to process vehicle, GPS, and weather streams with low-latency ingestion, AWS analytics integration, and Docker-based local environments.

title: RedditFlow Scalable ETL
description: A production-style Reddit ETL pipeline using Airflow and PySpark to move post data through S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift for scalable analytics and more reliable ingestion.

title: Airflow Docker Projects
description: A Docker-first Airflow workspace for developing and testing orchestration projects locally, with a setup oriented toward repeatable data-pipeline experimentation.
